layout_spacing.grid_strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID (Dense, data correlation, high scanability)

components.sidebar: Fixed left navigation pane, border-r border-border, transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out. Features 'Grid Borders' style. Contains collapsible sections for Chat History, User Profile, and a New Chat button. Active chat items use pure background shift, not pill shapes.
components.chat_area: Main content area spanning remaining width. Flex-col layout, overflow-y-auto with custom non-gutter scrollbars. Messages should display progressively (simulated streaming). Includes specific developer tools: inline syntax-highlighted ABAP code blocks with Copy/Accept actions.
components.prompt_input: Task-aware expandable prompt surface anchored at the bottom. Glassmorphism effect: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, 1px inner border-white/40, shadow-sm. Features a 'WorkIQ' scope selector (e.g., 'Scope: Global', 'Scope: BAPI') and a 'Dynamic Action Button' for submitting.
components.code_block: Retro-Futurism style. Deep black container (bg-gray-900) with subtle 1px border-gray-800. Top bar contains language label (ABAP) and contextual action buttons (Copy Code, Diff Accept). Text inside uses JetBrains Mono.
components.empty_state_cards: Suggested prompts displayed in 'Bento' Grid Mode. Flat background, 1px border. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow-lg, and border darkens. Examples: 'Write a SELECT query', 'Explain BAPI', 'Convert FORM to METHOD'.
components.login_page: Split layout. Left: Minimal geometric abstract tech image. Right: Clean, high-contrast form using Shadcn input/button. Heavily styled with generous padding (p-12) to match enterprise authority.

animations.message_enter: Fade in and slide up slightly for chat bubbles (initial opacity 0, y 10).
animations.sidebar_toggle: Smooth width transition with ease-in-out to prevent layout thrash.
animations.hover_states: Buttons and cards must have background tint shifts. Interactive elements explicitly set hover text color.
animations.voice_active: When voice input is active, apply 'The Tracing Beam' effect (a glowing gradient border tracing the mic button) to signal active listening.

login_background.description: Abstract green matrix code background, used for the left side of the login screen to emphasize developer focus. Implement with bg-black/50 overlay.

user_avatar.description: Professional developer portrait, used in the sidebar for user profile.

media_and_icons.logo_instructions: Render the SAP logo purely with typography and styling: `SAP Copilot`. Do NOT attempt to use an image URL for the brand logo.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA guidelines (min 4.5:1 for normal text). Overlays must not go darker than bg-black/50.
accessibility.focus: Apply focus:bg-gray-50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#008FD3] on all inputs and interactive elements.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements. Follow role-based kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='new-chat-button', data-testid='voice-input-toggle', data-testid='chat-history-item', data-testid='login-submit-button').

development_rules.component_libraries: Use Shadcn components heavily customized to avoid the default 'Vercel look'. Remove rounded-xl corners in favor of rounded-md to match 'Swiss & High-Contrast' rigidity.
development_rules.grid_structure: Grid items MUST be direct children. Override default stretch with align-items: start.

specific_functionalities.voice_input: Mic icon button in prompt bar. Requires clear visual feedback (pulse or tracing beam) when active.
specific_functionalities.chat_history: Clickable list items in sidebar. Must support active state highlighting. Ensure developers can switch contexts seamlessly.
specific_functionalities.copilot_features: Integrate 'WorkIQ' contextual scope badge above or inside the prompt input. Avoid full-screen chat dominance; reserve space for code block display.
